notes: The game should be run using the Windows XP version setting as part of Application settings and the Audio set to PulseAudio in Wine Config. Additionally, xact needs to be installed. These are to get the audio working. Everything else works fine.

notes: The game opened and soon closed, I realized that it was because of a configuration of the launcher of Uplay a config (Enable in-game overlay for supported games) deactivating this function the game opened normally.
title: Watch_Dogs™

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2500U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes: I had to install xact (protontricks 243470 xact) and set wine to Windows XP to get in-game audio working. Otherwise works well.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: To get it running: open the Uplay settings and disable "Enable in-game overlay for supported games" in the General tab (you can enter the Uplay settings by right clikcing on the Uplay icon in your taskbar after launching Watch_Dogs) . To get the audio work: wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sirmentio/protontricks/master/protontricks && chmod +x protontricks, wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sirmentio/protontricks/master/protontricks && chmod +x protontricks, protontricks 243470 xact, WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/243470/pfx/ winecfg and set the Windows version to XP.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: To launch the game: open the Uplay settings and disable "Enable in-game overlay for supported games" in the General tab (you can enter the Uplay settings by rightclicking on the Uplay icon in your taskbar after launching Watch_Dogs) . To get the audio work run the commands: wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sirmentio/protontricks/master/protontricks && chmod +x protontricks, wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sirmentio/protontricks/master/protontricks && chmod +x protontricks, protontricks 243470 xact, WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/243470/pfx/ winecfg and set the Windows version to XP.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: After installation it runs smoothly, but I had no sound in game (sound in main menu worked). I set compatibility to winXp using winecfg, installed xact via protontricks and set xaudio2_7 to native as described in other comments but this did not help. Finally I downloaded dxvk version 1.2.3 from here: https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk/releases and copied d3d10.dll, d3d10_1.dll, d3d10core.dll and dxgi.dll from x64 folder to a game folder and it helped. Now I have sound in game!
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box using the experimental branch of Proton. Download Proton-4.15-GE-4 from https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases, extract it into ~/.steam/root/compatibilitytools.d/, restart Steam and choose it from the list.
title: Watch_Dogs™

notes: Initially Steam would get stuck on setting up .NET after switching to Windows XP via winecfg and installing xact_64, but a restart of Steam did the trick. After that, I was able to launch the game. Performance seemed all right at first, but after a bit of running around it plummeted from 25-60 FPS to around 10 FPS. Not entirely sure what caused this, as it would, on occasion, raise back up to its former levels when standing in specific spots and looking at specific angles, but regardless I ended up turning almost everything down to the lowest settings (except resolution, anti-aliasing and level of detail, 1080p, temporal SMAA (I think) and highest, respectively). At these settings the game performed well however. Getting it to display in fullscreen on my main monitor was a bit tricky though as it kept wanting to place itself on my rightmost monitor rather than my leftmost one. I ended up having to turn the game off, disable the rightmost monitor, and then re-launch it as otherwise it would somehow re-active my rightmost monitor and disable my leftmost one if I changed the monitor settings while still in-game. When it did this it would also produce very weird graphical glitches in GNOME (note that this last part occurred when I used registry tweaks to achieve exclusive fullscreen which Proton disables by default).
title: Watch_Dogs™
